import json
from pydantic import BaseModel


class UserSchema(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
    email: str


def parse_user_payload(raw_json: str) -> UserSchema:
    data = json.loads(raw_json)
    return UserSchema.model_validate(data)


def load_config(config_str: str) -> UserSchema:
    parsed = json.loads(config_str)
    return UserSchema.model_validate(parsed)


def process_message(message_bytes: bytes) -> UserSchema:
    text = message_bytes.decode("utf-8")
    data = json.loads(text)
    return UserSchema.model_validate(data)
